fields.responsibilities:
Handled end-to-end marketing technology solution pipelines
Automated data cleaning workflows for campaign datasets
Built analytics automation scripts to extract insights from web campaigns
Generated performance dashboards from Google Analytics and Meta Ads data
fields.tech_used: Python, Pandas, Google Analytics API, Meta Ads API, Excel

fields.responsibilities:
Designed predictive ML models using Scikit-Learn on large-scale datasets
Performed feature engineering and hyperparameter tuning to optimize accuracy
Developed classification and regression pipelines on big data repositories
Documented model evaluation reports with confusion matrices and ROC curves.
fields.tech_used: Python, Scikit-Learn, Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib, Seaborn, Jupyter

fields.responsibilities:
Performed Exploratory Data Analysis on complex Kaggle datasets
Identified statistical patterns, outliers, and trends to support business decisions
Built interactive web apps using Streamlit for non-technical stakeholders
Created visualisations with Matplotlib and Seaborn to communicate data stories
fields.tech_used: Python, Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib, Seaborn, Streamlit, Kaggle

fields.title: Professional Certificate in Generative Al Development
fields.description: LLMS, Generative Systems Architecture, Prompt Engineering, RAG pipelines, fine-tuning transformer models, and responsible Al deployment.

fields.title: Developing Al Applications with Python and Flask
fields.description: Flask decorators, routing, API handling, integrating AI/ML models into production web endpoints, RESTful API design patterns.

fields.title: Python for Data Science
fields.description: OOP, Data Structures and Algorithms, Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib, and applied data science workflows.

fields.title: Certified Ethical Hacking (CEH) in Cyber Security
fields.description: Penetration testing methodologies, web application vulnerability analysis, network scanning with Wireshark, OWASP Top 10 exploitation.

fields.title: ReviewLens AI Sentiment Analysis
fields.tagline: NLP engine for Daraz product reviews using FastAPI, Scikit-Learn and TF-IDF.
fields.description: ReviewLens is an end-to-end Al-powered sentiment analysis platform for Daraz. The system ingests raw review text through a TF-IDF extraction pipeline and classifies sentiment via Scikit-Learn. Backend is served with FastAPI and visualised in Flutter.
fields.tech_stack: Python, FastAPI, Scikit-Learn, TF-IDF, NLP, Flutter, REST API

fields.title: Credit Card Fraud Detection App
fields.tagline: ML-powered fraud detection with Streamlit dashboard and Scikit-Learn pipelines.
fields.description: ML application identifying fraudulent credit card transactions across 284,807 records. Uses SMOTE oversampling, feature scaling, and Random Forest achieving 99.2% accuracy with a Streamlit analytics interface.
fields.tech_stack: Python, Scikit-Learn, Pandas, SMOTE, Random Forest, Streamlit, Matplotlib

fields.title: IP-Blocking Automation App
fields.tagline: Linux firewall automation suite integrating iptables with real-time logging graphs.
fields.description: Web-driven Linux automation providing a GUI for managing iptables firewall rules. Admins can block/unblock IPs and monitor real-time traffic logs through interactive chart dashboards.
fields.tech_stack: Python, Flask, iptables, Linux, Subprocess, Chart.js, HTML/CSS

fields.title: Advanced E-Learning Platform Database
fields.tagline: High-performance MySQL relational architecture with Streamlit admin GUI.
fields.description: Comprehensive relational database for a scalable e-learning platform with normalized tables for Users, Courses, Enrollments, Quizzes, and Progress tracking. Streamlit GUI enables non-technical admin management.
fields.tech_stack: MySQL, Streamlit, Python, SQLAlchemy, ER Modelling, Stored Procedures
